howItWorks.intro: This gpu benchmark comparison calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Estimated FPS = Base GPU FPS x Resolution Scale x Game Complexity Scale
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How many FPS do I need for smooth gaming?
faq.answer: 60 FPS is the baseline for smooth gameplay. 144 FPS is ideal for competitive gaming with a high-refresh monitor. Beyond 240 FPS offers diminishing returns unless you are a professional esports player.

faq.question: Should I get NVIDIA or AMD?
faq.answer: NVIDIA excels in ray tracing and DLSS upscaling. AMD offers better price-to-performance at mid-range. For pure rasterization, they trade blows. NVIDIA is preferred for streaming (NVENC encoder) and AI workloads.

howWeCalculate.intro: This gpu benchmark comparison calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.

whenToUse.intro: This gpu benchmark comparison calculator is designed for anyone who needs quick, reliable estimates.
scenarios: When you need a quick estimate before committing to a purchase or project
When comparing different options or scenarios side by side
When planning a budget and need to understand potential costs
When you want to verify a quote or estimate you've received
